refundStatus.descPending: Your refund request has been submitted. Review will complete within 1-2 business days.
refundStatus.descReviewing: Customer service is reviewing your refund request. Please wait patiently.
refundStatus.descRejected: Refund request rejected. Please contact customer service for details.
refundStatus.descProcessing: Refund is being returned to the original payment method. Please check.
refundStatus.descCompleted: Refund has been credited successfully. Please check.
refundStatus.descFailed: Refund processing failed. The system will retry automatically or contact customer service.
refundStatus.descCancelled: You have canceled this refund request.
